changeSet.author: Damir Seferberkov
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp" SCHEMA public;

changeSet.author: Damir Seferberkov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ma_medicals_db ( ID UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT public.uuid_generate_v4() PRIMARY KEY, country_en VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, country_ru VARCHAR(64), type VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, active_ingredient VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, description VARCHAR(1024) NOT NULL, indications VARCHAR(2048) NOT NULL, contraindications VARCHAR(2048) NOT NULL, dosing VARCHAR(5096) NOT NULL, kidney_friendly BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, pregnant_friendly BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, breastfed_friendly BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, liver_friendly BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, child_friendly BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE, stomach_friendly BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE );

changeSet.author: Damir Seferberkov
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_ma_medicals_db_type; DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_ma_medicals_db_country;
